query:
-- Creare tabella stores
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `stores` (
  `id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `address` text,
  `phone` varchar(50),
  `email` varchar(320),
  `settings` json,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `stores_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Creare tabella storeUsers
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `storeUsers` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `storeId` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('admin','manager','user') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `storeUsers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `idx_storeUsers_userId` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_storeUsers_storeId` (`storeId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Aggiungere preferredStoreId a users
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `preferredStoreId` varchar(36) AFTER `role`;

  CONSTRAINT `stores_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)

-- Creare tabella storeUsers
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `storeUsers` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `storeId` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('admin','manager','user') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `storeUsers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `idx_storeUsers_userId` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_storeUsers_storeId` (`storeId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Aggiungere preferredStoreId a users
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `preferredStoreId` varchar(36) AFTER `role`;
